expected.body: Calling Commit() inside the repeat loop can leave partial data if a later iteration fails.

candidate.body: Move the Commit() out of the loop; committing per iteration breaks atomicity.

note: commit-in-loop, paraphrased + different line

expected.body: Add SetLoadFields before FindSet so the whole record isn't loaded.

candidate.body: Use SetLoadFields to limit the columns read for this query.

note: setloadfields performance, same issue

expected.body: Currency code 'USD' is hardcoded; read it from setup instead.

candidate.body: Don't hardcode the currency — pull it from the configuration record.

note: hardcoded currency, same issue

expected.body: GET can fail when the customer is missing; handle the not-found case.

candidate.body: Missing error handling if the GET on Customer returns false.

note: unchecked GET, same issue

expected.body: You can't SetRange on a FlowField without calling CalcFields first.

candidate.body: Filtering directly on this FlowField won't work as written.

note: flowfield filter, same issue

expected.body: Building the filter from a concatenated string risks filter injection; use SetFilter with parameters.

candidate.body: Use parameterized SetFilter instead of concatenating user input into the filter.

note: filter injection, same issue

expected.body: This runs a database read per record — an N+1 pattern.

candidate.body: Querying inside the loop causes N+1 queries; batch the lookup.

note: n+1 query, same issue

expected.body: TestField(Quantity) is missing before posting.

candidate.body: Validate that Quantity is set before posting, e.g. with TestField.

note: missing testfield, severity differs

expected.body: Variable 'i' is declared but never used.

candidate.body: Remove the unused variable i.

expected.body: Calling Commit() inside the repeat loop can leave partial data on failure.

candidate.body: The procedure name should be PascalCase to match conventions.

expected.body: Possible null/empty reference: 'Customer' may be blank after the failed GET.

expected.body: Use IsEmpty() instead of Count() = 0 for performance.

expected.body: Currency code 'USD' is hardcoded; read it from setup.

candidate.body: The magic number 1000 should be extracted into a named constant.

expected.body: FindSet(true) should be FindSet(false) since records aren't modified.

candidate.body: Add SetLoadFields before this FindSet to limit columns.

expected.body: This loop reads every column of Customer; on large tables that's a major performance hit.

candidate.body: Call SetLoadFields(Name, "No.") before FindSet so only the needed fields are fetched.

note: setloadfields: symptom (slow full read) vs fix (call SetLoadFields)

expected.body: AA0217: the literal passed to Error() must be a Label variable.

candidate.body: Hardcoding this error text breaks translation; move it to a Label with an Err suffix.

note: hardcoded error string: rule number (AA0217) vs translation rationale

expected.body: The InStream is read twice without resetting position; the second read returns nothing.

candidate.body: Reset the stream position before reading it a second time.

note: stream re-read: symptom (empty second read) vs fix (reset position)

expected.body: This page exposes records without an OnOpenPage permission check.

candidate.body: Add a SecurityFiltering/permission guard so unauthorized users can't read these records.

expected.body: GET inside the loop is an N+1 performance problem.
